mapper.sql: order_id, order_no, user_id, total_amount, actual_amount, payment_method, payment_status, order_status, create_time, pay_time, complete_time, contact_name, contact_phone, remark, delete_flag
item_id, order_id, product_id, product_type, product_name, price, quantity, total_price, use_date, item_status
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO orders (order_no, user_id, total_amount, actual_amount, payment_method, payment_status, order_status, create_time, pay_time, complete_time, contact_name, contact_phone, remark, delete_flag) VALUES (#{orderNo}, #{userId}, #{totalAmount}, #{actualAmount}, #{paymentMethod}, #{paymentStatus}, #{orderStatus}, #{createTime}, #{payTime}, #{completeTime}, #{contactName}, #{contactPhone}, #{remark}, #{deleteFlag})

INSERT INTO order_item (order_id, product_id, product_type, product_name, price, quantity, total_price, use_date, item_status) VALUES (#{orderId}, #{productId}, #{productType}, #{productName}, #{price}, #{quantity}, #{totalPrice}, #{useDate}, #{itemStatus})
mapper.select: SELECT FROM orders WHERE order_id = #{orderId} AND delete_flag = 0
